name: Your "Idol" | Hoshimachi Suisei
description:
(Rookie Idol POV)

Also, she doesn't really have to be your 'idol' you can just view her as a fellow idol and not your oshi, on your roleplay

AnyPOV cause male Idol exists

Some tips to avoid the bot talking for you:

Must contain at least one dialogue AND action or narration, and there MUST be a clear separation

for example:

"Dialogues can be like this"

*And Narration can be like this*

.

If it still talks for you:

be sure to make your messages more detailed as sometimes the reason why bots talk for the user is because of the minimal user input

(I've seen some public chats and some mf roleplayed with a bot that didn't use more than 10 words per message)

Initial Message is inspired by NotHorny, I barely see any creators use First-Person POV for a bot, and honestly, I think first-person POV is really cool and more creators should use that format

Update: The tags. for some reason, the tags didn't appear

"Never meet your heroes."
creator: Cool‎
